title: FatedOriginsSMP
description:
Mods used in the Fated Origins SMP event! 
- None of the mods used are mine, all rights to original creators.
body:
_Ready for our next adventure?_ 

Fated Origins SMP is a unique Minecraft experience that blends classic gameplay with a touch of fantasy and fate. Our modpack offers a captivating journey where players are intertwined with the very fabric of the world. 

Fated SMP is known for our **low-modded/high-optimized** experience for those who want to play Minecraft with smaller computers or weaker connections. With this mod pack, we will explore new territories, new powers, and a temporary way of living. This modpack is a great start to anyone just starting their origins journey. 

Connect with like-minded players who share your passion for adventure and exploration. Forge friendships, create alliances, and build a thriving community. Your actions and decisions influence the world around you. Experience the consequences of your choices as the fate of the SMP unfolds.
